full_text:
Yuan Pang (Gongxi) 袁滂 (公喜)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Pang (袁滂), styledGongxi (公喜). Excellency during Ling’s reign. Father of Yuan Huan. Yuan Pang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
